description: Paths to Glory Patch 4 (18 September 2024) — Albion Journal mission condition change, Combat Balance Changes (Axes, Bows, Crossbows, Fire Staffs, Holy Staffs, Maces, Nature Staffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Spears, Swords, Helmets, Armors, Shoes, Other), Fixes.

sections.heading: Albion Journal
items: Mission condition changed: 'Keep a city plot you own in an auction cycle' → 'Bid 5 million Silver on a city plot you currently own'
sections.searchable_text: Albion Journal mission city plot auction cycle Bid 5 million Silver

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Axes Raging Blades Bows Deadly Shot Crossbows Deathward Climax Boltcasters Fire Staffs Fire Bolt Raging Flare Holy Staffs Divine Intervention Hallowfall Celestial Sphere Redemption Staff Maces Vendetta Camlann Mace Nature Staffs Elevated Nature Blight Staff Spiritual Seed Druidic Staff Shapeshifter Staffs Reality Fissure Wild Onslaught Primal Staff Spears Spectral Trident Trinity Spear Swords Soulless Stream Galatine Pair Helmets Growing Rage Royal Hood Armors Electric Field Stalker Jacket Requite Armor of Valor Shoes Evasive Jump Royal Shoes Other immunity bubble dismount reflectable spells

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Raging Blades Damage per tick 28 26

changes.raw_text: Raging Blades: Damage per tick: 28 → 26

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Deadly Shot Cooldown 3s 2s Energy cost 4 3 Debuff duration 6s 5s Standtime 0.4s 0.3s

changes.raw_text: Deadly Shot: Cooldown: 3s → 2s; Energy cost: 4 → 3; Debuff duration: 6s → 5s; Standtime: 0.4s → 0.3s

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Deathward Climax Boltcasters First tick 9.2 30.1 Damage increase per hit 9.2 5.4 total unchanged

changes.raw_text: Deathward Climax: First tick damage: 9.2 → 30.1; Damage increase per hit: 9.2 → 5.4 (total damage unchanged)

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Fire Bolt Damage per tick 5 4 Raging Flare Cooldown 10s 20s Energy cost 9 16 Initial damage 135 187 Damage per tick 5.97 7.2

changes.raw_text: Fire Bolt: Damage per tick: 5 → 4
Raging Flare: Cooldown: 10s → 20s; Energy cost: 9 → 16; Initial damage: 135 → 187; Damage per tick: 5.97 → 7.2

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Divine Intervention Hallowfall Cooldown reduction 40% 25% Celestial Sphere Redemption Staff Time between bounces 0.6s 0.9s

changes.raw_text: Divine Intervention: Cooldown reduction: 40% → 25%
Celestial Sphere: Time between bounces: 0.6s → 0.9s

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Vendetta Camlann Mace Cast uninterruptible

changes.raw_text: Vendetta: Cast is now uninterruptible

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Elevated Nature Blight Staff Healing alone 36 33 at least one ally 42 39 Spiritual Seed Druidic Staff Cooldown after recast 30s 25s

changes.raw_text: Elevated Nature: Healing (alone): 36 → 33; Healing (at least one ally): 42 → 39
Spiritual Seed: Cooldown after recast: 30s → 25s

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Reality Fissure First hit 87 101 Second hit 137 123 Wild Onslaught Primal Staff Fear duration 1.2s 1s Cast time 0.3s 0.6s

changes.raw_text: Reality Fissure: First hit damage: 87 → 101; Second hit damage: 137 → 123
Wild Onslaught: Fear duration: 1.2s → 1s; Cast time: 0.3s → 0.6s

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Spectral Trident Trinity Spear Jump speed 25% Standtime after landing 0.5s 0.35s

changes.raw_text: Spectral Trident: Jump speed increased by 25%; Standtime after landing: 0.5s → 0.35s

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Soulless Stream Galatine Pair Enemy health reduction 6% 10% 0 stack 88.2 90 1 stack 140.7 145 2 stack 211.05 215 3 stack 299.25 305

changes.raw_text: Soulless Stream: Enemy health reduction: 6% → 10%; 0 stack: 88.2 → 90; 1 stack: 140.7 → 145; 2 stack: 211.05 → 215; 3 stack: 299.25 → 305

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Growing Rage Royal Hood Cooldown 30s 25s Buff no longer expires max stacks no damage

changes.raw_text: Growing Rage: Cooldown: 30s → 25s; Buff no longer expires if no damage is dealt after reaching max stacks.
notes: Buff no longer expires if no damage is dealt after reaching max stacks

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Electric Field Stalker Jacket Cooldown 30s 40s Requite Armor of Valor damage resistances 40% channeling

changes.raw_text: Electric Field: Cooldown: 30s → 40s
Requite: Now increases damage resistances by 40% while channeling
notes: Now increases damage resistances by 40% while channeling

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Evasive Jump Royal Shoes Range 12m 14m

changes.raw_text: Evasive Jump: Range: 12m → 14m

subsections.heading: Other
subsections.searchable_text: Other immunity bubble region change debuffs damage-over-time forcefully dismounted cleanses crowd control transformation two-second immunity not reflectable Burning Field Fire Artillery Frozen Hell Hellfire Potion Inner Shadow Shadowcaller Nasty Wounds Hood of Tenacity Raging Storm Bow of Badon Thorn Growth Wall of Flames

changes.raw_text: Immunity bubble after changing regions now also prevents debuffs and damage-over-time effects from being applied
notes: Immunity bubble after changing regions now also prevents debuffs and damage-over-time effects from being applied

changes.raw_text: Being forcefully dismounted now cleanses crowd control and transformation effects, and provides a two-second immunity to further crowd control and transformation effects
notes: Being forcefully dismounted now cleanses crowd control and transformation effects, and provides a two-second immunity to further crowd control and transformation effects

changes.raw_text: The following spells are no longer reflectable: Burning Field (area DoT only), Fire Artillery (area DoT only), Frozen Hell (Icicle Staff), Hellfire Potion, Inner Shadow (Shadowcaller), Nasty Wounds (Hood of Tenacity), Raging Storm (Bow of Badon), Thorn Growth (area DoT only), Wall of Flames (all Fire Staffs)
notes: Burning Field (all Fire Staffs) — area damage-over-time only
Fire Artillery (all Fire Staffs) — area damage-over-time only
Thorn Growth (all Nature Staffs) — area DoT only

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Added missing AoE escalation to: Burning Field, Combustion (Infernal Staff), Counter (War Gloves), Crush Charge (Duskweaver Boots), Electric Discharge (Judicator Helmet), Flame Blast, Inner Shadow (Shadowcaller), Pyroblast, Snare Charge (Maces), Tackle (Great Hammer), Triple Kick (War Gloves)
Empowering Beam (all Arcane Staffs): Fixed issue where damage buff would not stack if two players targeted the same player simultaneously
Backhand Strike (all War Gloves): Fixed issue where the same target could be hit multiple times
Blind Spot (Shoes of Tenacity): Fixed issue where invisibility would persist while attacking or casting
Fixed issue where VFX of DoT or HoT spells would prematurely disappear after affected player shapeshifted into human form
Fixed issue where Embalmed Tiger skin did not display in the Appearance UI
[iOS] Fixed issue where tapping a search result in the Travel Planner UI would not autocomplete the destination
Fixed issue where some Steam achievements would not register as unlocked when completed on mobile
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes AoE escalation Burning Field Combustion Counter Crush Charge Electric Discharge Flame Blast Inner Shadow Pyroblast Snare Charge Tackle Triple Kick Empowering Beam damage buff Backhand Strike hit multiple times Blind Spot invisibility attacking casting VFX DoT HoT shapeshift human form Embalmed Tiger Appearance iOS Travel Planner autocomplete Steam achievements mobile graphical animation terrain audio localization
